channel.title: Upcoming OECD Publication Embargoes and Launches
channel.description: A list of dates and publications

item.title: Rapport sur la dette mondiale 2026 (version abrégée) - Soutenir la résilience d’un marché de la dette sous une tension croissante
item.description: Rapport sur la dette mondiale 2026 (version abrégée) - Soutenir la résilience d’un marché de la dette sous une tension croissante by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Wednesday 4 March 2026 at 13:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Global Debt Report 2026 - Sustaining Debt Market Resilience Under Growing Pressure
item.description: Global Debt Report 2026 - Sustaining Debt Market Resilience Under Growing Pressure by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Wednesday 4 March 2026 at 13:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Financial Protection Against Catastrophic Risks - Floods, Fires and Other Major Risks
item.description: Financial Protection Against Catastrophic Risks - Floods, Fires and Other Major Risks by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 5 March 2026 at 9:30.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Protection financière contre les risques de catastrophe (version abrégée) - Inondations, incendies et autres risques majeurs
item.description: Protection financière contre les risques de catastrophe (version abrégée) - Inondations, incendies et autres risques majeurs by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 5 March 2026 at 9:30.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Cильніші фінансові ринки та інституції для відновлення України
item.description: Cильніші фінансові ринки та інституції для відновлення України by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 5 March 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Stronger Financial Markets and Institutions for Ukraine’s Recovery
item.description: Stronger Financial Markets and Institutions for Ukraine’s Recovery by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 5 March 2026 at 14:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: Promoting public-private collaboration through the SDGs in Paraná, Brazil
item.description: Promoting public-private collaboration through the SDGs in Paraná, Brazil by Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities has an embargo on Tuesday 10 March 2026 at 0:01.
item.oe:directorate: Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities

item.title: Towards Chile’s Next Plan for Student Assessments
item.description: Towards Chile’s Next Plan for Student Assessments by Directorate for Education and Skills has an embargo on Friday 13 March 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: OECD Economic Surveys: Romania 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Romania 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Monday 16 March 2026 at 0:00.

item.title: Creating well-functioning energy markets in the Republic of Moldova
item.description: Creating well-functioning energy markets in the Republic of Moldova by Global Relations and Cooperation Directorate has an embargo on Wednesday 18 March 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: OECD Economic Surveys: Austria 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Surveys: Austria 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 19 March 2026 at 0:00.

item.title: Policies for the Future of Fisheries and Aquaculture in Peru
item.description: Policies for the Future of Fisheries and Aquaculture in Peru by Trade and Agriculture Directorate has an embargo on Tuesday 24 March 2026 at 15:00.

item.title: Health System Performance Assessment Framework for Luxembourg
item.description: Health System Performance Assessment Framework for Luxembourg by Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs has an embargo on Wednesday 25 March 2026 at 13:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Employment, Labour and Social Affairs

item.title: Towards an integrated rural fire management framework in Portugal
item.description: Towards an integrated rural fire management framework in Portugal by Environment Directorate has an embargo on Thursday 26 March 2026 at 0:01.

item.title: OECD Anti-Bribery Convention Phase 4 Report on Argentina - Implementing the Convention and Related Legal Instruments
item.description: OECD Anti-Bribery Convention Phase 4 Report on Argentina - Implementing the Convention and Related Legal Instruments by Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs has an embargo on Thursday 26 March 2026 at 11:00.
item.oe:directorate: Directorate for Financial and Enterprise Affairs

item.title: OECD Economic Outlook, Interim Report March 2026
item.description: OECD Economic Outlook, Interim Report March 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 26 March 2026 at 11:00.

item.title: Foundations for Growth and Competitiveness 2026
item.description: Foundations for Growth and Competitiveness 2026 by Economics Department has an embargo on Thursday 9 April 2026 at 0:00.
